toolIdeas.name: Trail Briefing Generator
toolIdeas.problem: Turn scattered route notes, weather, gear reminders, and meeting points into one concise trip briefing.
toolIdeas.nextStep: Add import hooks for GPX notes and weather snapshots.

toolIdeas.name: Painting Reference Pack
toolIdeas.problem: Collect a photo, palette notes, scene breakdown, and composition prompts before Dave starts a landscape painting.
toolIdeas.nextStep: Decide whether the pack should pull from local photos or Dropbox first.

toolIdeas.name: Club Admin Copilot
toolIdeas.problem: Reduce the grunt work around member notes, event prep, and follow-up actions for the off-road club.
toolIdeas.nextStep: Define the first workflow and the minimum data model.

modules.name: Local Capture Inbox
modules.description: Drop raw notes, pasted text, file references, or URLs into one place before sorting them.

modules.name: Entity Mapper
modules.description: Define reusable objects such as tool idea, module, workflow, source, and runbook.

modules.name: Workflow Runner
modules.description: Track multi-step tool flows with triggers, handoffs, and expected outputs.

modules.name: Review Console
modules.description: Give Dave a blunt daily view of what is blocked, stale, half-defined, or worth building next.

workflows.name: Idea → Module Draft
workflows.goal: Take a rough idea and turn it into a structured module definition.
workflows.trigger: Dave captures a tool idea with a clear pain point.
steps: Map likely users and source material
Split shared primitives into reusable modules

workflows.name: Module → Workflow Spec
workflows.goal: Combine modules into a repeatable workflow with inputs, outputs, and checkpoints.
workflows.trigger: At least two modules look stable enough to compose.

workflows.name: Daily Build Review
workflows.goal: Use the dashboard as a local control room for deciding what actually gets built next.
workflows.trigger: Start or end of work block
steps: Choose the module or workflow to touch
Leave a note for the next session

toolBlueprints.name: Trail Briefing Tool
toolBlueprints.purpose: Turn route notes, weather, and logistics into a concise trip briefing.

buildQueue.title: Persist data edits to local JSON or sqlite
buildQueue.why: Right now the app is a strong scaffold; the next step is real mutation instead of read-only seed data.

buildQueue.title: Add lightweight forms for new tool ideas and workflow notes
buildQueue.why: Dave should be able to capture ideas without touching JSON by hand.

buildQueue.title: Connect local files from second-brain as source references
buildQueue.why: Useful cross-linking without tangling the two apps together.

buildQueue.title: Track workflow runs and outcomes
buildQueue.why: A mission control that cannot tell you what happened is mostly interior decoration.
